music.name: Pegassi
music.why: 71 RA interested for a single-headliner Friday at 1015 — Pegassi is a name this crowd knows, and the room delivers
music.summary: Pegassi headlines 1015 Folsom on Friday July 31, 10pm–3am, $20–30. One of the stronger individual bookings of the week, drawing 71 RA interested, 21+.

music.name: Chris Luno — Day Party Terrace
music.why: 45 RA interested for an afternoon terrace set — Chris Luno at 620 Jones is a summer day party worth blocking the afternoon for
music.summary: Chris Luno plays the rooftop terrace at 620 Jones in the Tenderloin on Saturday August 1, 2pm–8pm, $17. A day-into-evening house set from a local favorite, with the terrace format making it a proper summer afternoon option. 21+.

music.name: As You Like It Unedited: All Night Rong w/ DJ Spun
music.why: DJ Spun is a Bay Area institution — As You Like It Unedited is the underground SF house night that actually digs, sliding-scale door
music.summary: As You Like It Unedited brings DJ Spun for an all-night-rong set at Underground SF on Friday July 31, 9pm–2am, $5–20 sliding scale. Deep house from a Bay Area stalwart in Haight's underground club space. 21+.

music.name: Death Guild
music.why: World's longest-running weekly goth night, cheap door, 18+, two rooms all night
music.summary: Death Guild, the world's oldest weekly goth/industrial dance night, takes over DNA Lounge on Monday July 27. Six DJs in two rooms — gothic, industrial, synthpop, noise, and ambient — 9:30pm to 2:30am, 18+.

music.name: House Of Joy: Sanjoy + ARINI
music.why: Sanjoy produced the FIFA World Cup anthem — global-scale headliner at a mid-size warehouse
music.summary: House of Joy brings Sanjoy, fresh off producing the official FIFA World Cup anthem, and SF-native genre-bending artist ARINI to The Midway, 21+.

music.name: Meduza Block Party
music.why: Global progressive-house hitmakers (Meduza) headline an outdoor Sacramento block party
music.summary: Meduza headlines an outdoor block party at Ali Youssefi Square in Sacramento, presented by All Day All Night x Earth1, 18+ to dance/21+ to drink.

music.name: Rhythm in the Sky
music.why: Free rooftop R&B at golden hour — rare weeknight open-air escape downtown
music.summary: DJ Heartbreak's weekly rooftop R&B residency at Timbri Hotel, every Wednesday 5–9pm. Free entry, 21+, golden-hour views over downtown SF.

music.name: ROLL 24: Legend of the Kandi King
music.why: Fantasy-themed all-night hardcore/gabber rave — Roll Initiative's 24th edition in a secret SF warehouse, hakken and kandi culture till sunrise
music.summary: ROLL 24: Legend of the Kandi King, Roll Initiative's fantasy-themed hardcore rave at a secret San Francisco warehouse (revealed day-of), Friday July 31, 8:30pm–3am, $25–30, 21+. Gabber, hardstyle, happy hardcore, drum & bass and jungle across the night with Froggin, Froppi, Dr1ft, Psymatik, DJ Flapjack, Rafer Rawb and Princess Tornado.

music.name: Toro Y Moi Live
music.why: Chillwave/indie-electronic pioneer plays an intimate 250-cap room, not an arena
music.summary: Toro y Moi (Chaz Bear) brings his genre-blending indie-electronic sound to the small, storied Bottom of the Hill club, 21+, doors 8pm.

music.name: Colorize SF: PRAANA — Mees Salomé — Jack Willard
music.why: Colorize's first SF show puts PRAANA and Mees Salomé at The Great Northern — melodic and organic, the quiet serious option on a big Friday
music.summary: Colorize brings its first San Francisco night to The Great Northern on Friday July 31, 8pm–2am, with PRAANA, Mees Salomé and Jack Willard playing melodic techno and progressive house. Organized by the London-based label. 21+.

music.name: bodyheat × Braket: Sard (live) & Friends
music.why: Eight-hour run at F8 with a Sard live set at the center — bodyheat's long-format Saturday is the outlier pick for those who like F8 before the crowd arrives
music.summary: bodyheat × Braket present Sard (live) & Friends at F8 on Saturday August 1, 7pm–3am, $25. An 8-hour session anchored by a live set from Sard, surrounded by residents and guests across bass and techno. 21+.

music.name: After Life: Matt Hart (live) + DJs
music.why: Matt Hart live at DNA Lounge — UK industrial and EBM artist whose live presence the bio calls 'unmistakable'; heavier and darker than the weekend's average set
music.summary: After Life at DNA Lounge on Saturday August 1, 9pm–2am. A dark electronics night with UK industrial/EBM/synth-wave artist Matt Hart performing live, plus DJs curating midtempo darkwave, industrial bass and dark techno. Limited capacity, inclusive community focus. 21+.

music.name: Colorize: PRAANA — Mees Salomé — Jack Willard
music.why: London deep/progressive house label's world tour stop, also PRAANA's album release party
music.summary: Colorize's world tour brings PRAANA — celebrating their 'Insight Out' album release — plus Mees Salomé and Jack Willard to The Great Northern, 21+.

music.name: Emmit Fenn
music.why: Atmospheric melodic-bass touring headliner on the Midway Terrace stage
music.summary: Emmit Fenn brings his atmospheric melodic-bass sound to The Midway's terrace stage, 21+, doors 2pm.

music.name: Teed DJ-Kicks Tour
music.why: TEED's entry into the legendary DJ-Kicks mix series, built from his adopted-LA late-night sound
music.summary: Totally Enormous Extinct Dinosaurs (TEED) tours behind his 2026 DJ-Kicks album — exclusive originals and late-night club cuts — at Monarch, 21+.

music.name: Acid Summer: Tyrel Solar, Mozhgan & CLAWS
music.why: Mozhgan and Tyrel Solar bring the acid heat to F8 on a Wednesday — a proper midweek rave for those who can't wait till Friday
music.summary: Acid Summer at F8 on Wednesday July 29, 9pm–2am, $10. Tyrel Solar, Mozhgan and CLAWS bring acid house and techno to 1192 Folsom — a midweek club night that earns the name. 21+.

music.name: Clownzone: Goth Clown Night at Interzone
music.why: Interzone goes full clown — goth, EBM and darkwave with a face-paint mandate; weirdest Tuesday in SoMa
music.summary: Interzone Darkwave Tuesdays goes Clownzone on July 28: goth clown night at F8, 9pm–2am, $5. The weekly darkwave/EBM night with a costume theme — show up in clown makeup for maximum effect. 21+.

music.name: Yala Papa: Middle Eastern × Latin Dance Party
music.why: Middle Eastern and Latin rhythms colliding at The Stud — the most sonically adventurous Friday option in SoMa
music.summary: Yala Papa brings a Middle Eastern × Latin dance party to The Stud on Friday July 31, 9pm–2am, $15. A genre-boundary-crossing night at SoMa's storied queer bar, blending Arabic and Latin rhythms on the dancefloor. 21+.

music.name: BEACHCRIMES — Day Party at Hotel Via Rooftop
music.why: Rooftop Sunday afternoon with Bay and bridge views — the day-after option that doesn't require a dark room or earplugs
music.summary: BEACHCRIMES hosts a Sunday day party on the Hotel Via rooftop at 138 King St (Mission Bay) on Sunday August 2, 1pm–6pm, $17. Outdoor house, waterfront views and a civilized Sunday tempo. 21+.

music.name: Club Blush: An Ethereal & Euphoric Dance Night
music.why: A tribute set spanning Fred again.., ODESZA, Disclosure and Flume in one euphoric night
music.summary: Club Blush pays tribute to euphoric house/dance hits from Rufus Du Sol, Flume, Disclosure, Fred again.., ODESZA and more at Public Works Loft, 21+.

music.name: Kontravoid + Normal Bias
music.why: Dark-pop EBM/goth touring headliner with support, a real ticketed show not a bar DJ set
music.summary: Canadian dark-pop/EBM artist Kontravoid headlines Rickshaw Stop with support from Normal Bias, spanning EBM, electro and goth.

music.name: Omnya, Tara, Jake Vance
music.why: Melodic techno duo's US debut, hypnotic driving production
music.summary: OMNYA makes their US debut with hypnotic, driving melodic techno at Halcyon, supported by rising Israeli artists TARA and Jake Vance, 21+.

music.name: 2000s Rave
music.why: 2000s-nostalgia rave at a proper mid-size Sacramento concert venue
music.summary: A 2000s-themed nostalgia rave takes over Ace of Spades in Sacramento.

music.name: Afro Thursdays
music.why: Bi-weekly Afro house night, free before 11pm with RSVP
music.summary: F8's recurring Afro Thursdays night brings Afro house DJs to the SoMa club, free with RSVP before 11pm, 21+.

music.name: After Life: Dark Electronica Experience
music.why: Dedicated to the darker, heavier fringe of electronica — witch house, industrial bass, dark techno
music.summary: After Life spotlights the darker side of electronica — witch house, industrial bass, dark techno and darkwave — at DNA Lounge, 18+.

music.name: Bass n Babes Presents: So Sus
music.why: Vancouver bass artist plus a ravewear swap and treasure hunt side program
music.summary: So Sus headlines Monarch's basement with support from Encantra, Kaviera, Baby Kush and BTCH PLZ, plus a Raveival ravewear swap and treasure hunt, 21+.

music.name: Days Like This
music.why: Free lakeside sunset house party, all ages
music.summary: Days Like This returns to Lake Merritt Pergola for a free all-ages sunset house party by the water.

music.name: DJ Slugo, Profesito
music.why: Late-night F8 SoMa club night running until 3am
music.summary: DJ Slugo and Profesito headline a late night of house at F8, running 9pm to 3am, 21+.

music.name: ero808
music.why: Intimate 400-cap Gods and Monsters room inside The Midway complex
music.summary: ero808 headlines the intimate Gods and Monsters room at The Midway, 21+.

music.name: Frolic
music.why: Recurring house night at a mid-size SoMa club
music.summary: Frolic brings a house DJ lineup to The Great Northern, 21+.

music.name: Hot Girl Summer: Bootie Mashup
music.why: 2010s pop-diva mashup night with live drag pop-up tributes
music.summary: Bootie Mashup's Hot Girl Summer edition spins 2010s pop-diva mashups (Kesha, Megan Thee Stallion, Beyoncé) with drag pop-ups from The Monster Show, 21+.

music.name: No Signal San Francisco: The Whomp Wagon Fundraiser
music.why: Proceeds rebuild a Burning Man art car lost to fire — a cause, not just a party
music.summary: No Signal SF takes over Audio with N2N, Drevo, Adil, PAWS, Yogen and Crosby Stark; proceeds fund rebuilding The Whomp Wagon art car after a 2026 fire.

music.name: Romain Garcia, Cassie Vega
music.why: Rooftop house set at Sacramento's popular Darling Aviary
music.summary: Romain Garcia headlines a rooftop house set at Darling Aviary in downtown Sacramento, 21+.

music.name: San Frandisco!
music.why: DNA Lounge's own recurring goth/industrial dance night, 18+ all ages door
music.summary: San Frandisco! brings DNA Lounge's signature dark electronic dance night, 18+, doors 9:30pm.

music.name: Sard (Live) & F:Rmna
music.why: Live house act closes out F8's SoMa room until 3am
music.summary: Sard performs live alongside F:Rmna at F8, running until 3am, 21+.

music.name: Soraya, Chellzz Xavier b2b Piste
music.why: Soraya's Audio debut set, table reservations available for a bigger-production night
music.summary: Soraya makes her debut at Audio SF with support from Chellzz Xavier b2b Piste, 21+.

music.name: Steam Towel Party: San Francisco August Edition
music.why: Recurring queer towel-party series with complimentary coat check
music.summary: STEAM Towel Party's August edition returns to The Stud, 21+, complimentary coat check included.

music.name: Sweet Tooth Fest
music.why: A discover-new-talent day party, $1 before 4pm with RSVP
music.summary: Sweet Tooth Fest showcases emerging local DJs on one stage at The Stud, $1 entry with RSVP before 4pm, 21+.

music.name: Underground Nomads 13 Years
music.why: 13th-anniversary of a world-beat/global-bass night with live belly dancers, not typical club EDM
music.summary: Underground Nomads celebrates 13 years of blending underground and world dance music at F8, with resident and guest belly dancers alongside DJs and live acts.

music.name: William Kiss, Sagmo, Issa
music.why: Percussive main-floor melodies from a touring artist at Halcyon
music.summary: William Kiss brings percussive, rumbling main-floor melodies to Halcyon, supported by Sagmo and Issa, 21+.

music.name: 620 Jones After Party
music.why: Continues the 620 Jones day party into the night at Audio
music.summary: The 620 Jones day party's official after party continues at Audio SF, 21+.

music.name: DJ Huffy
music.why: Local funky disco/house DJ residency at a cozy retro dance-floor bar
music.summary: DJ Huffy plays a free night of funky disco and house at Make-Out Room, the dimly-lit retro Mission bar with a disco ball over the dance floor.

music.name: House Music Thursdays
music.why: Free house night at a laid-back Dogpatch dog-friendly bar
music.summary: The Sea Star's weekly House Music Thursdays bring free DJ sets to this dog-friendly Dogpatch neighborhood bar, 21+.

music.name: Inner Circle
music.why: Free weekly house/EDM night at a Marina neighborhood bar
music.summary: Inner Circle brings a free weekly house and EDM dance night to White Rabbit in the Marina, 21+.

music.name: Knives
music.why: Santa Cruz's hard-techno night, cheap door with free RSVP option
music.summary: Knives headlines a hard-techno night at MOTIV in Santa Cruz, 21+, free with RSVP or $5–15 door.

music.name: Pretty Grls Rage
music.why: Sacramento's industrial-chic underground room hosts a bass-heavy rage night
music.summary: Pretty Grls Rage brings a bass-forward dance night to Reunion Underground's industrial-chic Sacramento room, 21+.

music.name: So House Your Evening So Far?
music.why: Free community house night, low-key Monday recurring residency
music.summary: The Valencia Room hosts its recurring free Monday house night, community-focused with dancing and free RSVP guest list, 21+.

music.name: Strictly House
music.why: Downtown San Jose's recurring straight-up house night
music.summary: Strictly House brings a classic house DJ set to The Continental in downtown San Jose, 21+.

music.name: Vinylissimo
music.why: All-vinyl DJ set at a cozy Mission dance-floor bar
music.summary: Vinylissimo brings an all-vinyl house DJ set to Make-Out Room's disco-ball dance floor, 21+.

music.name: Wonderland Fridays: Baile & Bounce
music.why: Weekly downtown San Jose bass/dubstep club night
music.summary: Wonderland Fridays brings a baile-funk-and-bounce bass set to Aura Night Club in downtown San Jose, 21+.

music.name: College Thursday
music.why: Weekly Berkeley college-crowd DJ night near campus
music.summary: Kip's hosts its weekly College Thursday DJ night, a Berkeley campus-adjacent bar staple, 21+.

music.name: Friday Party
music.why: Weekly Friday dance night at a Berkeley campus-adjacent bar
music.summary: Kip's weekly Friday Party brings DJs to the Berkeley college bar, 21+.

music.name: Taco Tuesday Party
music.why: $2 tacos and margarita fishbowls power a weekly Berkeley college-bar dance night
music.summary: Kip's weekly Taco Tuesday combines $2 tacos and $30 margarita fishbowls with DJs at this longtime Berkeley college bar.

music.name: Brat + Bratwurst Summer: Fridays on Front Street
music.why: A free street pop-up landing one week before Charli xcx headlines SF's big August festival — a brat-pop street party with a lookalike contest and Bavarian beer-hall food, not just another club night.
music.summary: Downtown SF Partnership and Noise Pop kick off their 2026 Fridays on Front Street series with Brat + Bratwurst Summer: indie dance and brat-pop DJ sets (DJ Papa Xanny, JLittle, Bapari), a Charli xcx lookalike contest, Y2K shopping pop-up, and Bavarian beer-hall food, Friday July 31, 4-9pm, free with RSVP, all ages.

music.name: Velvet Rudiments
music.why: A new monthly two-room series pairing an all-vinyl analog room against an all-CDJ digital room in the same night — a format bet, not just another lineup.
music.summary: Velvet Rudiments launches a new monthly series at Hawthorn SF, Thursday July 30, 8pm-late, free with RSVP, 21+. Main room: all-vinyl house from Good Question, Combover, Greg Eversoul. Bonaparte Room: CDJ house from &ndmore, Little Lord, Devcloud.

sports.name: Fog City Run (Wednesday 5K)
sports.why: A $5 timed 5K through the hilly Marina every Wednesday — the cheapest racing buzz in the city
sports.summary: Fog City Run hosts a weekly hilly 5K race starting from The Blue Light bar at 1979 Union St in SF's Marina district on Wednesday July 29 at 6:30pm, rain or shine; arrive by 6:15pm, $5.

sports.name: Midnight Runners SF: GGP 5K Bootcamp Run w/ Music
sports.why: Free bootcamp-style 5K through Golden Gate Park with music and group exercise stops — high-energy, no one left behind, ends with a bar hang
sports.summary: Midnight Runners SF hosts a free bootcamp-style 5K run on Wednesday July 29, meeting at Kezar Pub for bag drop by 6:25pm and starting from Kezar Stadium's west entrance at 6:30pm. Roughly 1-mile segments alternate with group exercise stops; all paces welcome (comfortable running 3 miles), post-run hang at Kezar Pub after.

sports.name: Sunset Dunes parkrun 5K
sports.address: 1349 Upper Great Hwy, San Francisco, CA 94122
sports.why: Free timed 5K on the coastal dunes with ocean views — Saturday's best zero-cost athletic start
sports.summary: Sunset Dunes parkrun hosts a free weekly timed 5K at Sunset Dunes Park on Upper Great Hwy in SF on Saturday August 1 at 8am; register free at parkrun.us, all paces welcome, all ages.

sports.name: 510 Run to Beers
sports.why: 2.6-mile Oakland loop that ends with craft beer on Temescal's outdoor patio — untimed, no pressure
sports.summary: 510 Run to Beers meets at Temescal Brewing Co. at 4115 Telegraph Ave in Oakland on Thursday July 30 at 6:30pm for a free ~2.6-mile group run to Piedmont Ave and back; all paces welcome, beers after.

sports.name: Berkeley Running Club: Tilden Park Trail Run
sports.why: Hilly 5–10 mile Tilden trails with a flexible group — the real runner's pick if flat roads bore you
sports.summary: Berkeley Running Club meets at Tilden Park (Lone Oak) on Tuesday July 28 at 6:30pm for a free hilly trail run of 5–10 miles depending on pace group; all are welcome, self-sufficient runners preferred.

sports.name: Marin Running Club: Thursday Trail Run
sports.address: 703 Tennessee Valley Rd, Mill Valley, CA 94941
sports.why: Mid-week trail escape from SF — Tennessee Valley to the ocean and back, free and untimed
sports.summary: Marin Running Club meets at Tennessee Valley Trailhead in Mill Valley on Thursday July 30 at 6pm for a free group trail run with distances and pace groups to suit all levels; self-sufficient runners.

sports.name: Marin Running Club: Tuesday Bunny Run
sports.address: 703 Tennessee Valley Rd, Mill Valley, CA 94941
sports.why: Beginner-paced 30-minute trail intro at a gorgeous Marin trailhead — slowest and most welcoming run of the week
sports.summary: Marin Running Club's Tuesday Bunny Run meets at Tennessee Valley Trailhead in Mill Valley on Tuesday July 28 at 6pm, a free beginner-friendly 30-minute trail run at a leisurely pace; all welcome.

sports.name: Mission 5K Fun Run
sports.why: Casual Monday neighborhood run that ends at a bar — social first, athletic second
sports.summary: The Mission Fun Runs group meets at Teeth Bar in the Mission on Monday July 27 at 6:30pm for a free social 5K run through the neighborhood; all paces welcome, drinks after.

sports.name: Oakland Beer Runners: Lake Merritt Run
sports.why: Free Tuesday jog around Lake Merritt followed by craft beer — running optional, community the point
sports.summary: Oakland Beer Runners meets at Original Pattern Brewing Co. on Tuesday July 28 at 6:30pm for a free group run around Lake Merritt (approx 3 miles); all paces welcome, drinks at the brewery after.

sports.name: Polo Field 5K (DSE Runners)
sports.address: Middle Dr W & Metson Rd, San Francisco, CA
sports.why: Free Sunday 5K inside Golden Gate Park from a club that's been running the same loop for decades
sports.summary: DSE Runners hosts a free weekly Polo Field 5K in Golden Gate Park on Sunday August 2 at 9am, starting at the polo fields; open community run, all paces welcome.

sports.name: SFRRC Wednesday Fun Run in the Presidio
sports.address: 610 Old Mason St, San Francisco, CA 94129
sports.why: Scenic Presidio loop with an organized club — best midweek views in SF for zero cost
sports.summary: SF Road Runners Club hosts a free weekly Wednesday fun run from Sports Basement Presidio on July 29 at 6pm, with routes through the Presidio trails and park roads; all paces welcome.
